props.name: clearOnBlur
props.comment: If true, clears the filter text in the input when the input loses focus

props.name: create
props.comment: A React element rendered when users want to create a new choice inline

props.name: createHintValue
props.comment: Sentinel value identifying the 'create' item internally; only needed when the default collides with a real choice value

props.name: createItemLabel
props.comment: Label for the 'Create …' menu item shown when the filter is non-empty; supports %{item} interpolation

props.name: createLabel
props.comment: Hint label shown when the filter is empty, prompting users that they can create a new option

props.name: createValue
props.comment: The option value stored for the 'create' item in the dropdown; defaults to '@@ra-create'

props.name: emptyText
props.comment: Accepted for API parity with AutocompleteInput; not rendered in the array variant (use badge × to deselect)

props.name: handleHomeEndKeys
props.comment: If true, Home/End keys scroll the dropdown list to the first/last item

props.name: isOptionEqualToValue
props.comment: Custom equality check between a choice value and a selected field value; defaults to areIdsEqual (loose ==)

props.name: limitChoicesToValue
props.comment: If true, the dropdown shows only already-selected choices instead of all unselected choices

props.name: matchSuggestion
props.comment: Custom filter function replacing the default substring match; required when optionText is a React element

props.name: noOptionsText
props.comment: Content shown in the dropdown when no choices match the current filter; defaults to ra.navigation.no_results

props.name: onCreate
props.comment: Callback invoked with the current filter text when the user picks the create item; returns the new choice object
